_doc.purpose: Localization companion for item_gamecd_RW.json. Holds en-us entries for the knowledge_game_rw_* flavor-text cluster.
_doc.rw_reference_note: Critical: 'rw_reference' itself needed an en-us entry too, distinct from item_gamecd_RW (which hardcodes 'Rib World' directly rather than using the token). Every knowledge_game_rw_* entry below embeds %%rw_reference%%, so without this entry the token would render literally as 'rw_reference' in English builds instead of resolving.
_doc.naming_convention: Per user decision 2026-07-22: distinctive game-coined proper nouns (Glitterworld, Archotech, Mechanoids) got a light parody alteration, matching the title's own treatment (RimWorld -> Rib World). Plain generic sim-genre vocabulary (Pawns, Raids, Mood, Mental Break, Research, Trading, Pirates, Tribespeople, Insectoids) was translated directly since it isn't a proprietary coined term. The three AI storyteller names (Cassandra Classic, Randy Random, Phoebe Chillax) are a deliberate exception: the zh-cn source itself already spells them as puns matching their real official localized names (e.g. 卡珊德拉·经典 = Cassandra·Classic), so those are reproduced as the real names rather than re-parodied - see name_consistency.md.

en-us.knowledge_game_rw_storytellers_cassandra: The good times won't last forever.
Hang in there a little longer. Let's see what you're made of.
en-us.knowledge_game_rw_storytellers_randy_1: I just wanted to see what would happen...
en-us.knowledge_game_rw_storytellers_phoebe_0: Relax, take a good rest. You've earned this peace.
